steps.title: Set f(x) equal to 18
steps.content:
The function is $f(x)=6x$. The condition $f(x)=18$ gives:
$$6x=18$$

steps.title: Check
steps.content: Substitute $x=3$ into the function: $f(3)=6(3)=18$. This matches the required output, so no other value is needed for this one-step linear equation.
